 251            @* Устанавливаем выбранный статус через JS после рендера *@
 252            <script>
 253                                // Когда страница загрузилась — устанавливаем статусы для всех записей
 254                document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
 255                    // Razor-цикл: для каждой записи из C# генерирует строку JavaScript
 256                    // Например: setSelectValue(5, 3); setSelectValue(12, 1);
 0257                    @foreach (var appt in appointments)
 0258                    {
 259                            <text>
 260                            setSelectValue(@appt.Id, @((int)appt.Status));
 261                            </text>
 0262                    }
 263                });
 264
 265                // Находит select нужной записи по ID и устанавливает нужное значение
 266                function setSelectValue(apptId, status) {
 267                    var rows = document.querySelectorAll('.appt-row');
 268                    rows.forEach(function(row) {
 269                        var sel = row.querySelector('.status-select');
 270                        // Ищем select у которого в onchange есть нужный ID записи
 271                        if (sel && sel.getAttribute('onchange').includes('(' + apptId + ',')) {
 272                            sel.value = status;          // устанавливаем значение
 273                            updateSelectStyle(sel);      // красим в нужный цвет
 274                        }
 275                    });
 276                }
 277
 278                // Красит select в цвет соответствующий статусу
 279                function updateSelectStyle(sel) {
 280                    sel.className = 'status-select';     // сбрасываем старые классы
 281                    var classes = {
 282                        1: 'status-scheduled',           // Запланирована — голубой
 283                        2: 'status-confirmed',           // Подтверждена  — зелёный
 284                        3: 'status-completed',           // Выполнена     — серый
 285                        4: 'status-cancelled',           // Отменена      — красный
 286                        5: 'status-noshow'               // Не явился     — жёлтый
 287                    };
 288                    sel.classList.add(classes[sel.value] || '');  // добавляем класс нужного цвета
 289                }
 290            </script>
 291

 368                        <div class="stat-info">
 369                            <span class="stat-value">@pendingList.Count</span>
 370                            <span class="stat-label">На модерации</span>
 371                        </div>
 372                    </div>
 373                    <div class="stat-card-small">
 374                        <div class="stat-icon">✅</div>
 375                        <div class="stat-info">
 376                            <span class="stat-value">@approvedList.Count</span>
 377                            <span class="stat-label">Одобрено</span>
 378                        </div>
 379                    </div>
 380                    <div class="stat-card-small">
 381                        <div class="stat-icon">❌</div>
 382                        <div class="stat-info">
 383                            <span class="stat-value">@rejectedList.Count</span>
 384                            <span class="stat-label">Отклонено</span>
 385                        </div>
 386                    </div>
 387                </div>
 388
 389                <div class="reviews-tabs">
 390                    <button class="tab-btn active" id="tabPending" onclick="switchReviewTab('pending')">
 391                        На модерации
 0392                        @if (pendingList.Count > 0)
 0393                        {
 394                            <span class="badge">@pendingList.Count</span>
 0395                        }
 396                    </button>
 397                    <button class="tab-btn" id="tabApproved" onclick="switchReviewTab('approved')">Одобренные</button>
 398                    <button class="tab-btn" id="tabRejected" onclick="switchReviewTab('rejected')">
 399                        Отклонённые
 400                    </button>
 401                    <button class="tab-btn" id="tabAll" onclick="switchReviewTab('all')">Все</button>
 402                </div>
 403
 404                @* Вкладка: На модерации *@
 405                <div id="reviewsPending" class="reviews-list">
 0406                    @if (!pendingList.Any())
 0407                    {
 408                        <div class="empty-state"><div class="empty-icon">📭</div><h4>Нет отзывов на модерации</h4></div>
 0409                    }
 410                    else
 0411                    {
 0412                        @foreach (var r in pendingList)
 0413                        {
 414                            @await Html.PartialAsync("_ReviewCard", r)
 0415                        }
 0416                    }
 417                </div>
 418
 419                @* Вкладка: Одобренные *@
 420                <div id="reviewsApproved" class="reviews-list" style="display:none">
 0421                    @if (!approvedList.Any())
 0422                    {
 423                        <div class="empty-state"><div class="empty-icon">📭</div><h4>Нет одобренных отзывов</h4></div>
 0424                    }
 425                    else
 0426                    {
 0427                        @foreach (var r in approvedList)
 0428                        {
 429                            @await Html.PartialAsync("_ReviewCard", r)
 0430                        }
 0431                    }
 432                </div>
 433
 434                @* Вкладка: Все *@
 435                <div id="reviewsAll" class="reviews-list" style="display:none">
 0436                    @if (!allReviews.Any())
 0437                    {
 438                        <div class="empty-state"><div class="empty-icon">📭</div><h4>Отзывов пока нет</h4></div>
 0439                    }
 440                    else
 0441                    {
 0442                        @foreach (var r in allReviews)
 0443                        {
 444                            @await Html.PartialAsync("_ReviewCard", r)
 0445                        }
 0446                    }
 447                </div>
 448
 449                <div id="reviewsRejected" class="reviews-list" style="display:none">
 450
 0451                    @if (!rejectedList.Any())
 0452                    {
 453                        <div class="empty-state"><div class="empty-icon">📭</div><h4>Нет отклонённых отзывов</h4></div>
 0454                    }
 455                    else
 0456                    {
 0457                        @foreach (var r in rejectedList)
 0458                        {
 459                            @await Html.PartialAsync("_ReviewCard", r)
 0460                        }
 0461                    }
 462                </div>
 463            </div>
 0464        }
 465
 466        @* ==================== КЛИЕНТЫ ==================== *@
 0467        else if (activeTab == "clients")
 0468        {
 0469            var clients = ViewBag.Clients as List<Client> ?? new List<Client>();
 0470            var appointmentCounts = ViewBag.AppointmentCounts as Dictionary<int, int> ?? new Dictionary<int, int>();
 0471            int totalCount = ViewBag.TotalClientsCount ?? 0;
 0472            string clientSearch = ViewBag.ClientSearch ?? "";
 473
 474            <div class="management-section">
 475                <div class="section-header">
 476                    <h2><i class="bi bi-people"></i> Управление клиентами</h2>
 477                    <a href="/admin/index?tab=clients" class="refresh-btn" title="Обновить">
 478                        <i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i>
 479                    </a>
 480                </div>
 481
 482                <div class="search-section">
 483                    <input type="text" class="search-input" id="clientSearchInput"
 484                           value="@clientSearch"
 485                           placeholder="🔍 Поиск по имени или телефону..."
 486                           oninput="filterClients(this.value)" />
 487                </div>
 488
 0489                @if (!clients.Any())
 0490                {
 491                    <div class="empty-state">
 492                        <div class="empty-icon">👥</div>
 493                        <h4>Клиенты не найдены</h4>
 494                    </div>
 0495                }
 496                else
 0497                {
 498                    <div class="stats-summary">
 499                        <p>
 500                            <strong>Всего клиентов:</strong> @totalCount |
 501                            <strong>Отображается:</strong> @clients.Count
 0502                            @if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(clientSearch))
 0503                            {
 504                                <span> (поиск: "@clientSearch")</span>
 0505                            }
 506                        </p>
 507                    </div>
 508
 509                    <div class="table-responsive">
 510                        <table class="admin-table" id="clientsTable">
 511                            <thead>
 512                                <tr>
 513                                    <th class="sortable" onclick="sortClients('name')">Имя <span id="sort-name">↕</span>
 514                                    <th class="sortable" onclick="sortClients('phone')">Телефон <span id="sort-phone">↕<
 515                                    <th>Email</th>
 516                                    <th class="sortable" onclick="sortClients('count')">Записей <span id="sort-count">↕<
 517                                    <th class="sortable" onclick="sortClients('date')">Дата регистрации <span id="sort-d
 518                                    <th>Заметки</th>
 519                                    <th>Действия</th>
 520                                </tr>
 521                            </thead>
 522                            <tbody>
 0523                                @foreach (var client in clients)
 0524                                {
 0525                                    int apptCount = appointmentCounts.TryGetValue(client.Id, out int cnt) ? cnt : 0;
 526                                    <tr class="client-row"
 527                                        data-name="@client.Name.ToLower()"
 528                                        data-phone="@client.Phone"
 529                                        data-count="@apptCount"
 530                                        data-date="@client.CreatedAt.ToString("yyyyMMdd")">
 531                                        <td><strong>@client.Name</strong></td>
 532                                        <td>@client.Phone</td>
 533                                        <td>@(client.Email ?? "—")</td>
 534                                        <td><span class="count-badge">@apptCount</span></td>
 535                                        <td>@client.CreatedAt.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy")</td>
 536                                        <td class="notes-cell">
 0537                                            @if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(client.Notes))
 0538                                            {
 539                                                <span>—</span>
 0540                                            }
 541                                            else
 0542                                            {
 543                                                <span class="notes-text" title="@client.Notes">@client.Notes</span>
 544                                                // полный текст в title (всплывающая подсказка)
 0545                                            }
 546                                        </td>
 547                                        <td class="actions-cell">
 548                                            <button class="btn-icon edit"
 549                                                    onclick="openClientNotesModal(@client.Id, '@((client.Notes ?? "").Re
 550                                                    title="Редактировать заметку">
 551                                                <i class="bi bi-pencil"></i>
 552                                            </button>
 553                                            <button class="btn-icon delete"
 554                                                    onclick="confirmDeleteClient(@client.Id)"
 555                                                    title="Удалить клиента">
 556                                                <i class="bi bi-trash"></i>
 557                                            </button>
 558                                        </td>
 559                                    </tr>
 0560                                }
 561                            </tbody>
 562                        </table>
 563                    </div>
 0564                }
 565            </div>
 566
 567            <div class="modal-overlay" id="clientNotesModal" style="display:none" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeC
 568                <div class="modal-content">
 569                    <div class="modal-header">
 570                        <h3><i class="bi bi-pencil-square"></i> Заметка о клиенте</h3>
 571                        <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeClientNotesModal()">✕</button>
 572                    </div>
 573                    <form method="post" action="/admin/saveClientNotes">
 574                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
 575                        <input type="hidden" name="clientId" id="editClientId" />
 576                        <div class="modal-body">
 577                            <div class="form-group">
 578                                <label class="form-label">Заметка</label>
 579                                <textarea class="form-control" name="notes" id="editClientNotes" rows="4"
 580                                      placeholder="Например: аллергия на клей X, предпочитает эффект натуральных ресниц.
 581                            </div>
 582                        </div>
 583                        <div class="modal-footer">
 584                            <button type="button" class="btn-secondary" onclick="closeClientNotesModal()">Отмена</button
 585                            <button type="submit" class="btn-primary">Сохранить</button>
 586                        </div>
 587                    </form>
 588                </div>
 589            </div>
 590
 591            <form method="post" action="/admin/deleteClient" id="deleteClientForm" style="display:none">
 592                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
 593                <input type="hidden" name="clientId" id="deleteClientId" />
 594            </form>
 0595        }
 596
 597        @* ==================== УСЛУГИ ==================== *@
 0598        else if (activeTab == "services")
 0599        {
 0600            var services = ViewBag.Services as List<Service> ?? new List<Service>();
 601
 602            <div class="management-section">
 603                <div class="section-header">
 604                    <h2><i class="bi bi-grid"></i> Управление услугами</h2>
 605                    <div class="header-actions">
 606                        <button class="filter-btn" onclick="openServiceModal(0,'','','0','60')">
 607                            <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Добавить услугу
 608                        </button>
 609                        <a href="/admin/index?tab=services" class="refresh-btn" title="Обновить">
 610                            <i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i>
 611                        </a>
 612                    </div>
 613                </div>
 614
 0615                @if (!services.Any())
 0616                {
 617                    <div class="empty-state">
 618                        <div class="empty-icon">💅</div>
 619                        <h4>Услуги не найдены</h4>
 620                        <p>Добавьте первую услугу</p>
 621                    </div>
 0622                }
 623                else
 0624                {
 625                    <div class="table-responsive">
 626                        <table class="admin-table" id="servicesTable">
 627                            <thead>
 628                                <tr>
 629                                    <th class="sortable" onclick="sortServices('name')">Название <span id="svc-sort-name
 630                                    <th>Описание</th>
 631                                    <th class="sortable" onclick="sortServices('price')">Цена <span id="svc-sort-price">
 632                                    <th class="sortable" onclick="sortServices('duration')">Длительность <span id="svc-s
 633                                    <th>Активна</th>
 634                                    <th>Действия</th>
 635                                </tr>
 636                            </thead>
 637                            <tbody>
 0638                                @foreach (var svc in services)
 0639                                {
 0640                                    string svcDesc = (svc.Description ?? "").Replace("'", "\\'");
 0641                                    string svcName = svc.Name.Replace("'", "\\'");
 0642                                    string activeColor = svc.IsActive ? "#28a745" : "#dc3545";
 0643                                    string activeText = svc.IsActive ? "✓ Да" : "✗ Нет";
 0644                                    string toggleIcon = svc.IsActive ? "eye-slash" : "eye";
 645
 646                                    <tr class="svc-row"
 647                                        data-name="@svc.Name.ToLower()"
 648                                        data-price="@svc.Price"
 649                                        data-duration="@svc.DurationMinutes">
 650                                        <td><strong>@svc.Name</strong></td>
 651                                        <td>@(svc.Description ?? "—")</td>
 652                                        <td class="price-cell">@svc.Price.ToString("N0") ₽</td>
 653                                        <td>@svc.DurationMinutes мин</td>
 654                                        <td><span style="color:@activeColor">@activeText</span></td>
 655                                        <td class="actions-cell">
 656                                            <button class="btn-icon edit"
 657                                                    onclick="openServiceModal(@svc.Id,'@svcName','@svcDesc','@svc.Price'
 658                                                    title="Редактировать">
 659                                                <i class="bi bi-pencil"></i>
 660                                            </button>
 661                                            <form method="post" action="/admin/toggleService" style="display:inline">
 662                                                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
 663                                                <input type="hidden" name="serviceId" value="@svc.Id" />
 664                                                <button type="submit" class="btn-icon delete" title="@(svc.IsActive ? "Д
 665                                                    <i class="bi bi-@toggleIcon"></i>
 666                                                </button>
 667                                            </form>
 668                                        </td>
 669                                    </tr>
 0670                                }
 671                            </tbody>
 672                        </table>
 673                    </div>
 0674                }
 675            </div>
 676
 677            @* Модалка услуги *@
 678            <div class="modal-overlay" id="serviceModal" style="display:none" onclick="if(event.target===this)closeServi
 679                <div class="modal-content">
 680                    <div class="modal-header">
 681                        <h3 id="serviceModalTitle"><i class="bi bi-grid"></i> Услуга</h3>
 682                        <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeServiceModal()">✕</button>
 683                    </div>
 684                    <form method="post" action="/admin/saveService">
 685                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
 686                        <input type="hidden" name="serviceId" id="serviceId" />
 687                        <div class="modal-body">
 688                            <div class="form-group">
 689                                <label class="form-label">Название</label>
 690                                <input type="text" class="form-control" name="name" id="serviceName" placeholder="Назван
 691                            </div>
 692                            <div class="form-group">
 693                                <label class="form-label">Описание</label>
 694                                <textarea class="form-control" name="description" id="serviceDescription" rows="3"></tex
 695                            </div>
 696                            <div class="form-group">
 697                                <label class="form-label">Цена (₽)</label>
 698                                <input type="number" class="form-control" name="price" id="servicePrice" step="0.01" />
 699                            </div>
 700                            <div class="form-group">
 701                                <label class="form-label">Длительность (мин)</label>
 702                                <input type="number" class="form-control" name="duration" id="serviceDuration" />
 703                            </div>
 704                        </div>
 705                        <div class="modal-footer">
 706                            <button type="button" class="btn-secondary" onclick="closeServiceModal()">Отмена</button>
 707                            <button type="submit" class="btn-primary">Сохранить</button>
 708                        </div>
 709                    </form>
 710                </div>
 711            </div>
 0712        }
 713        @* ==================== РАСПИСАНИЕ ==================== *@
 0714        else if (activeTab == "schedule")
 0715        {
 0716            var blockedSlots = ViewBag.BlockedSlots as List<LashBooking.Domain.Entities.BlockedSlot> ?? new();
 717
 718            <div class="management-section">
 719                <div class="section-header">
 720                    <h2><i class="bi bi-calendar-x"></i> Управление расписанием</h2>
 721                </div>
 722
 723                @* Форма блокировки *@
 724                <div class="schedule-form">
 725                    <h3 class="schedule-form-title">Заблокировать время</h3>
 726                    <form method="post" action="/admin/blockSlot">
 727                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
 728                        <div class="schedule-form-row">
 729                            <div class="form-group">
 730                                <label class="form-label">Дата</label>
 731                                <input type="date" class="form-control" name="date"
 732                                       min="@DateTime.Today.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd")"
 733                                       value="@DateTime.Today.ToString("yyyy-MM-dd")" required />
 734                            </div>
 735                            <div class="form-group">
 736                                <label class="form-label">Время</label>
 737                                <select class="form-control" name="hour">
 738                                    <option value="-1">Весь день</option>
 0739                                    @for (int h = 9; h < 18; h++)
 0740                                    {
 741                                        <option value="@h">@h:00</option>
 0742                                    }
 743                                </select>
 744                            </div>
 745                            <div class="form-group">
 746                                <label class="form-label">Причина (необязательно)</label>
 747                                <input type="text" class="form-control" name="reason" placeholder="Например: выходной" /
 748                            </div>
 749                            <div class="form-group form-group-btn">
 750                                <button type="submit" class="btn-primary">Заблокировать</button>
 751                            </div>
 752                        </div>
 753                    </form>
 754                </div>
 755
 756                @* Список заблокированных слотов *@
 757                <h3 class="schedule-list-title">Заблокированные слоты</h3>
 758
 0759                @if (!blockedSlots.Any())
 0760                {
 761                    <div class="empty-state">
 762                        <div class="empty-icon">📅</div>
 763                        <h4>Нет заблокированных слотов</h4>
 764                    </div>
 0765                }
 766                else
 0767                {
 768                    <div class="table-responsive">
 769                        <table class="admin-table">
 770                            <thead>
 771                                <tr>
 772                                    <th>Дата</th>
 773                                    <th>Время</th>
 774                                    <th>Причина</th>
 775                                    <th>Действия</th>
 776                                </tr>
 777                            </thead>
 778                            <tbody>
 0779                                @foreach (var slot in blockedSlots)
 0780                                {
 781                                    <tr>
 782                                        <td><strong>@slot.Date.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy")</strong></td>
 783                                        <td>
 0784                                            @if (slot.BlockedHour == null)
 0785                                            {
 786                                                <span class="block-badge day">Весь день</span>
 0787                                            }
 788                                            else
 0789                                            {
 790                                                <span class="block-badge hour">@slot.BlockedHour:00</span>
 0791                                            }
 792                                        </td>
 793                                        <td>@(slot.Reason ?? "—")</td>
 794                                        <td>
 795                                            <form method="post" action="/admin/unblockSlot" style="display:inline">
 796                                                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
 797                                                <input type="hidden" name="slotId" value="@slot.Id" />
 798                                                <button type="submit" class="btn-icon delete" title="Снять блокировку">
 799                                                    <i class="bi bi-x-lg"></i>
 800                                                </button>
 801                                            </form>
 802                                        </td>
 803                                    </tr>
 0804                                }
 805                            </tbody>
 806                        </table>
 807                    </div>
 0808                }
 809            </div>
 0810        }
 811        @* ==================== ГАЛЕРЕЯ ==================== *@
 0812        else if (activeTab == "gallery")
 0813        {
 0814            var galleryPhotos = ViewBag.GalleryPhotos as List<GalleryPhoto> ?? new List<GalleryPhoto>();
 815
 816            <div class="management-section">
 817                <div class="section-header">
 818                    <h2><i class="bi bi-image"></i> Управление галереей</h2>
 819                    <div class="header-actions">
 820                        <button class="filter-btn" onclick="document.getElementById('galleryModal').style.display='flex'
 821                            <i class="bi bi-plus-lg"></i> Добавить фото
 822                        </button>
 823                    </div>
 824                </div>
 825
 0826                @if (!galleryPhotos.Any())
 0827                {
 828                    <div class="empty-state">
 829                        <div class="empty-icon">🖼</div>
 830                        <h4>Фотографий пока нет</h4>
 831                        <p>Добавьте первое фото в галерею</p>
 832                    </div>
 0833                }
 834                else
 0835                {
 836                    <div class="gallery-admin-grid">
 0837                        @foreach (var photo in galleryPhotos)
 0838                        {
 839                            <div class="gallery-admin-item">
 840                                <img src="/images/gallery/@photo.FileName" alt="@(photo.Description ?? "Фото")" class="g
 841                                <div class="gallery-admin-overlay">
 842                                    <div class="gallery-admin-info">
 0843                                        @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(photo.Description))
 0844                                        {
 845                                            <span class="gallery-admin-desc">@photo.Description</span>
 0846                                        }
 847                                        <span class="gallery-admin-date">@photo.UploadedAt.ToString("dd.MM.yyyy")</span>
 848                                    </div>
 849                                    <form method="post" action="/admin/deleteGalleryPhoto" style="display:inline">
 850                                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
 851                                        <input type="hidden" name="photoId" value="@photo.Id" />
 852                                        <button type="button" class="gallery-admin-delete" onclick="confirmDeletePhoto(t
 853                                            <i class="bi bi-trash"></i>
 854                                        </button>
 855                                    </form>
 856                                </div>
 857                            </div>
 0858                        }
 859                    </div>
 860                    <div class="stats-summary" style="margin-top: 20px">
 861                        <p><strong>Всего фото:</strong> @galleryPhotos.Count</p>
 862                    </div>
 0863                }
 864            </div>
 865
 866            @* Модалка загрузки фото *@
 867            <div class="modal-overlay" id="galleryModal" style="display:none" onclick="if(event.target===this)this.style
 868                <div class="modal-content">
 869                    <div class="modal-header">

 871                        <button class="modal-close" onclick="document.getElementById('galleryModal').style.display='none
 872                    </div>
 873                    <form method="post" action="/admin/uploadGalleryPhoto" enctype="multipart/form-data">
 874                        @Html.AntiForgeryToken()
 875                        <div class="modal-body">
